endpoints.label: Create or Update Item

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Data to Send
fields.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

fields.label: Automatically Parse Numbers
fields.description: Whether to convert number-looking string values to DynamoDB Number (N). Disable to keep strings as String (S).

fields.label: Inputs to Ignore
fields.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

fields.label: Fields to Send
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fieldValues, fieldValues.fieldId, fieldValues.fieldValue)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: eavUi, conditionExpression, eanUi)

fields.label: Filter Expression
fields.description: A filter expression determines which items within the Scan results should be returned to you. All of the other results are discarded. Empty value will return all Scan results.

endpoints.description: [unverified path] Create a new record, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Return
fields.description: Use ReturnValues if you want to get the item attributes as they appeared before they were deleted

fields.label: Keys
fields.description: Item's primary key. For example, with a simple primary key, you only need to provide a value for the partition key. For a composite primary key, you must provide values for both the partition key and the sort key. (JSON object; supported keys: keyValues, keyValues.key, keyValues.type, keyValues.value)

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: conditionExpression, eanUi, expressionAttributeUi)

fields.label: Filter Expression
fields.description: A filter expression determines which items within the Scan results should be returned to you. All of the other results are discarded. Empty value will return all Scan results.

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Keys
fields.description: Item's primary key. For example, with a simple primary key, you only need to provide a value for the partition key. For a composite primary key, you must provide values for both the partition key and the sort key. (JSON object; supported keys: keyValues, keyValues.key, keyValues.type, keyValues.value)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: projectionExpression, eanUi, readType)

fields.label: Filter Expression
fields.description: A filter expression determines which items within the Scan results should be returned to you. All of the other results are discarded. Empty value will return all Scan results.

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Scan
fields.description: Whether to do an scan or query. Check differences.

fields.label: Filter Expression
fields.description: A filter expression determines which items within the Scan results should be returned to you. All of the other results are discarded. Empty value will return all Scan results.

fields.label: Key Condition Expression
fields.description: Condition to determine the items to be retrieved. The condition must perform an equality test on a single partition key value, in this format: partitionKeyName = :partitionkeyval

fields.label: Expression Attribute Values
fields.description: Substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression (JSON object; supported keys: eavValues, eavValues.attribute, eavValues.type, eavValues.value)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: indexName, projectionExpression, filterExpression, eanUi)
